title: nxr task document
description: FROZEN (V2.0): versioned task orchestration metadata (schema version 1). Tasks coordinate flake apps; they do not replace them. Breaking changes require a new major schema_version. Optional additive `apps` listing metadata is allowed within major 1.

schema_version.description: Major schema version. Unsupported majors must be rejected.

tasks.description: Map of task name to task definition.

apps.description: Optional listing metadata for flake app leaf names. Does not define apps; apps remain apps.<system>.* outputs.

category.description: Optional logical category for list/inspect filtering.

description.description: Optional short description for listings and completion.

dependsOn.description: Task names that must complete before this task runs. Defaults to [].

app.description: Flake app leaf name (apps.<system>.<name>) this task runs.

workingDirectory.description: Optional working-directory policy (`invocation`, `flake-root`) or flake-root-relative path. Absolute paths are rejected.

hidden.description: When true, the task is omitted from default listings.

category.description: Optional logical category for grouping in listings.

aliases.description: Optional alternate names resolved by explicit task commands (not bare nxr <name>).

interactive.description: When true, the node requires exclusive terminal access (stdin inherited; cannot run concurrently with peers or multiplexed output).
